description: Clean up a shared workstation browser for tax season by separating personal and tax-related data. Delete all 15 non-work/entertainment bookmarks and organize the remaining 20 tax bookmarks into four new folders on the bookmark bar: 'IRS Resources' (containing IRS sites), 'State Tax Authorities' (containing CA, NY, TX, and FL sites), 'Professional & Standards' (containing AICPA, Tax Foundation, and NATP), and 'Tax Software & Tools' (containing Drake, TaxAct, SSA, FinCEN, and EDGAR). Selectively delete history entries and cookies for entertainment/social domains while preserving those for tax and government domains. Configure the browser with custom search engine shortcuts for keywords 'irs', 'pub', and 'ssa', set the homepage to 'https://www.irs.gov', and set startup pages to open 'irs.gov' and 'drakesoftware.com'. Update privacy and security settings to disable password saving, address autofill, and payment methods, block third-party cookies, and enable both Enhanced Safe Browsing and Do Not Track. Set the default download directory to '/home/ga/Documents/Client_Tax_Files' and enable the prompt to always ask where to save files.
